stale-fixture.description: Start the backend with the stale fixture even though the task expects clean fixture state.

backend-http-500.description: Start the backend in HTTP 500 mode for account requests.

broken-automation-runner.description: Pre-seed a busy agent-device iOS runner lease before evidence capture.

failed-install.description: Corrupt the built app bundle immediately before installation.

runtime-kill-after-open.description: Terminate the app immediately after agent-device opens a session and before screenshot/snapshot evidence.
